svg.title: Quasi 0-D/1-D Fontan schematic with R-L-C vessel chains
svg.desc: Closed-loop Fontan network with active atrium, AAo, aortic arch, upper and lower vascular beds, quasi R-L-C aortic and Fontan chains, and pulmonary Windkessel beds.
svg.text: Same closed-loop components as full 0-D, with aortic and Fontan pathways replaced by PhysioBlocks R-L-C chains. Nominal flow follows the arrows.
Task 008 calibrated configs: AAo/arch x4 and DAo x6 geometry-based chains; SVC x3, IVC x5, RPA x3, LPA x4 preserve Task 005 chain totals.
Aortic tree and systemic vascular beds
Fontan R-L-C chains and pulmonary return

g.text: very high in baseline; lower when opened
Quasi R-L-C labels denote repeated hydraulic_rl_block + c_block cells; Task 008 retunes only global heart/systemic/pulmonary-bed scales.
